mission.title: sops: add command unset
mission.description:
Add an `unset` command to remove a key or item from the file.

Fixes #1305.

I'm not familiar with Go or Rust, so I mainly adapted what was already present in the `set` command.

resolution.summary: The test failure was due to using the same file `test_unset.json` for both JSON and YAML tests. I amended the commit to fix this issue.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
